description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: H

The subject believes it has been poisoned, and acts as though it has suffered 2d6 ability damage to an ability score of your choice. The subject gains a +2 bonus to its save if you choose Constitution. If the subject's HP are reduced to 0 or lower due to this effect, it acts accordingly. If the subject takes damage while unconscious because of this effect, it will remain awake for 1 round before falling unconscious again.

There is no secondary damage, and the penalties fade immediately when the technique ends. A creature cannot be affected by more than one instance of this technique at the same time.
